model.name: ArchiHotel Enterprise Architecture
model.documentation: Enterprise architecture model for ArchiHotel Group. Focus 2: Room Access & Daily Briefing. Created for EAM course — TUM Chair of Information Systems Heilbronn 2026.

element.name: Guest
element.documentation: Hotel guest who accesses rooms and facilities using their key card.

element.name: Receptionist
element.documentation: Front desk staff who issues and configures key cards at check-in.

element.name: Housekeeping Staff
element.documentation: Hotel staff with authorized key cards to enter rooms for cleaning and maintenance.

element.name: Room Access Service
element.documentation: Provides secure, controlled access to guest rooms and authorized facilities via key card verification.

element.name: Key Card Issuance Service
element.documentation: Issues and configures a key card with access rights at guest check-in.

element.name: Check-in & Issue Key Card
element.documentation: Receptionist processes guest check-in in the HMS, then issues and configures a key card with room and facility access rights.

element.name: Access Room
element.documentation: Guest presents key card to door reader; system verifies access rights and unlocks the door if authorized.

element.name: Key Card
element.documentation: Physical RFID card issued to guests and staff, carrying access rights for rooms and facilities.

element.name: Access Rights
element.documentation: Digital permissions stored on the key card and in the HMS, defining which rooms and areas the card holder may enter.

element.name: Guest Reservation
element.documentation: Approved reservation record containing guest identity, room assignment, and stay details.

element.name: Hotel Manager
element.documentation: Leads the daily morning briefing. Responsible for operational coordination across all departments.

element.name: Head of Concierge
element.documentation: Attends the daily briefing and coordinates concierge team assignments and VIP handling.

element.name: Head of Housekeeping
element.documentation: Attends the daily briefing and aligns housekeeping priorities for the day.

element.name: Hotel Staff
element.documentation: All operational staff (reception, concierge, housekeeping, service teams) who consume briefing updates via the Staff Portal.

element.name: Daily Operational Briefing Service
element.documentation: Service that delivers a shared, real-time operational picture to all departments every morning before arrivals begin.

element.name: Generate Briefing Report
element.documentation: HMS automatically assembles the Arrival Schedule, VIP List, special requests, and operational updates into the Briefing Report each morning.

element.name: Conduct Briefing Meeting
element.documentation: Hotel Manager, Head of Concierge, and Head of Housekeeping review the Briefing Report, align on VIPs, cross-dept tasks, and staffing priorities.

element.name: Broadcast Coordination
element.documentation: Agreed priorities and task assignments are pushed to all staff Android phones via the Staff Portal app.

element.name: Arrival Schedule
element.documentation: List of all expected guest arrivals for the day, including room assignments, times, and guest details.

element.name: VIP List
element.documentation: Curated list of high-value arriving guests with their special requests (airport transfer, champagne, late check-out, etc.).

element.name: Briefing Report
element.documentation: Daily operational document consolidating arrivals, VIP list, transfers, housekeeping tasks, and cross-departmental coordination notes.

element.name: Special Request
element.documentation: Guest-submitted request (in-room preparation, transfer, VIP service) that requires cross-department coordination.

element.name: Hotel Management System
element.documentation: Central system managing reservations, guest profiles, room status, key card configuration, and open costs. Hosted on AWS.

element.name: Door System Software
element.documentation: Software that verifies RFID key card access rights and controls door lock/unlock decisions.

element.name: Energy Management System
element.documentation: System that activates the room electrical circuit when a valid key card is inserted in the card switch.

element.name: Key Card Configuration Service
element.documentation: Application service within the HMS that assigns and stores access rights on a key card at check-in.

element.name: Access Verification Service
element.documentation: Application service within Door System Software that validates RFID card credentials and issues unlock/deny decision.

element.name: Energy Activation Service
element.documentation: Application service that activates or deactivates the room electrical circuit based on card-switch state.

element.name: Access Rights Record
element.documentation: Digital record of permissions per key card: which rooms and service areas are accessible and for which period.

element.name: Card Credential
element.documentation: RFID credential data transmitted by the key card to the door reader for verification.

element.name: Room Power State
element.documentation: Current on/off state of the room electrical circuit, driven by the energy saver card switch.

element.name: Staff Portal
element.documentation: Android app installed on staff smartphones. Delivers push notifications, operational dashboard, briefing reports, task lists, and schedules to all hotel staff.

element.name: Briefing Report Generation Service
element.documentation: HMS service that automatically assembles the daily Briefing Report from reservation, VIP, transfer, and special request data each morning.

element.name: Push Notification Service
element.documentation: Service within the Staff Portal that broadcasts urgent updates, task assignments, and coordination messages to staff Android devices.

element.name: Operational Dashboard Service
element.documentation: Service within the Staff Portal that renders a real-time dashboard combining arrivals, VIP list, housekeeping tasks, and briefing info.

element.name: Briefing Report Data
element.documentation: Structured digital document: arrivals count, VIP list, transfer schedule, housekeeping todos, and cross-dept coordination tasks.

element.name: Arrival Schedule Data
element.documentation: Machine-readable arrival list synchronized to staff devices from the HMS each morning.

element.name: Task Assignment Data
element.documentation: Housekeeping and coordination task records distributed to staff via the Staff Portal.

element.name: AWS Cloud Server
element.documentation: Central cloud server on Amazon Web Services hosting the Hotel Management System and storing guest data, reservations, and access rights.

element.name: Door Card Reader
element.documentation: Physical RFID reader mounted on each room door that reads the key card credential and triggers the Door System Software verification.

element.name: Energy Saver Interface
element.documentation: In-room card switch device: when a valid key card is inserted, it activates the room electrical circuit; removal cuts power to save energy.

element.name: Reception PC & Terminal
element.documentation: Receptionist workstation (PC + payment terminal) used to process check-in and configure key cards in the HMS.

element.name: Hotel Wi-Fi Network
element.documentation: Internal wireless network connecting all devices, workstations, and applications across the hotel for real-time data synchronization.

element.name: RFID Communication
element.documentation: Short-range RFID wireless protocol used by the key card and door card reader to transmit access credentials securely.

element.name: Door System Software Runtime
element.documentation: Runtime environment for the Door System Software; deployed on the door card reader infrastructure.

element.name: Access Rights Data Store
element.documentation: Persistent storage of key card access rights records on the AWS server, read by Door System Software during verification.

element.name: Android Smartphone
element.documentation: Staff-issued Android device running the Staff Portal app, receiving push notifications and displaying the operational dashboard.

element.name: Briefing Report File
element.documentation: Daily generated report artifact stored on the AWS server and synchronized to staff devices via Wi-Fi.

element.name: Task Assignment Store
element.documentation: Persistent storage of housekeeping and coordination task records on the AWS server.
